patches.semantic: .rdata section characteristics: add IMAGE_SCN_MEM_EXECUTE so the simulator PoC stubs placed in an existing zero cave are executable.
softcut64 stub for standalone_tail_edx: clamp coverage >=256 to 255, zero coverage <64, preserve intermediate 8-bit gray coverage.
Redirect original FreeType gray coverage clamp for standalone_tail_edx to the softcut64 stub at 0x140d99630.

Redirect original FreeType gray coverage clamp for sweep_inlined_eax to the softcut64 stub at 0x140d99670.

Redirect original FreeType gray coverage clamp for sweep_inlined_r8d to the softcut64 stub at 0x140d996b0.
